Method.Name: main
createViewSqlStmt
createSQLStatement2019
Method.Source: private str createSQLStatement2019() { str sqlStmt = strFmt(@"SELECT 0 AS %1, 0 AS %2, 0 AS %3, '' AS %4, 0 AS %5, '' AS %6, 0 AS %7, 0 AS %8, '' AS %9, '' AS %10, 1010 AS %11 FROM sys.query_store_query WHERE 1=0", asQueryHintId, asQueryId, asReplicaGroupId, asQueryHintText, asLastQueryHintFailureReason, asLastQueryHintFailureReasonDesc, asQueryHintFailureCount, asSource, asSourceDesc, asComment, asRecId); return sqlStmt; }

Method.Name: createSQLStatement2022
Method.Source: private str createSQLStatement2022() { str sqlStmt = strFmt(@"SELECT r.query_hint_id AS %1, r.query_id AS %2, r.replica_group_id AS %3, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.query_hint_text) AS %4, r.last_query_hint_failure_reason AS %5, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.last_query_hint_failure_reason_desc) AS %6, r.query_hint_failure_count AS %7, r.source AS %8, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.source_desc) AS %9, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.comment) AS %10, 1010 AS %11 FROM sys.query_store_query_hints r", asQueryHintId, asQueryId, asReplicaGroupId, asQueryHintText, asLastQueryHintFailureReason, asLastQueryHintFailureReasonDesc, asQueryHintFailureCount, asSource, asSourceDesc, asComment, asRecId); return sqlStmt; }

Method.Name: createSQLStatement
initialize
construct
